description_long: This is a heavy-duty mallet-style hammer featuring a large, cylindrical black head with blue end caps. The head appears to be made of dense rubber or a composite material, designed for delivering non-marring blows. The handle is straight and constructed from a light-colored wood, transitioning into a black, rubberized ergonomic grip for improved comfort and control. The overall design is robust, with the head securely mounted to the handle, suitable for tasks requiring force without damaging surfaces. The hammer shows no visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments. Its utilitarian appearance makes it ideal for use in urban maintenance, construction, or repair settings.
description: A robust mallet hammer with a black cylindrical head, blue end caps, and a straight wooden handle featuring a black ergonomic grip. Designed for heavy-duty, non-marring impact tasks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face of the black cylindrical head, blue end caps, and the straight handle with a black grip.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blue end cap of the hammer head and the slim profile of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the opposite face of the head and the handle's grip.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the blue end cap and the handle's side profile.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a black rubberized ergonomic grip, designed for comfort and slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Large cylindrical mallet head made of black rubber with blue end caps, featuring flat striking faces on both ends.
